PRIMARY SOLUTION TIP:
WHEN ALL ELSE FAILS, GO LITERAL.
AND WHEN “THAT” FAILS, USE
“THE HOLY GRAIL”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 7 --

STORY AND OFFER STRUCTURE TIPS
‣ Take your avatars and turn them into reluctant heroes (“My 	wife
ran into the room in tears…”) This allows your prospect to see
themselves in the story. And assuming you’re the “working hero”,
the rest of your audience will lock on to your journey.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 7 --

STORY AND OFFER STRUCTURE TIPS
‣ Tell the story in a 	chiasmus. 	This is a Grecian story narrative found
throughout many Greek legends (it’s even in the Bible.)
‣ 	Point 1
‣ Point 2
‣ Point 3 (crux of your message)
‣ 	Invert Point 2
‣ Invert Point 1
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 7 --

STORY AND OFFER STRUCTURE TIPS
‣ The 	worst thing 	you can do to 	lose fat 	is 	cardio.
‣ 	Cardio 	drains your energy, and your body needs that energy to
repair muscle damage after a workout.
‣ In fact, muscle growth and resistance training is a far
better long-term fat-burning solution.
‣ Cardio is great for your heart, and you should do mild forms of it
like brisk walking, which actually helps 	restore energy.
‣ 	That’s why the 	best advice 	for 	increasing your metabolism 	and
burning more fat is to exchange cardio for 	resistance training.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
